ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content_creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the content creator */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel the creator manages */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the content creator */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the creator's account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the creator's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the content creator */,
  "banner_image" TEXT /* Banner image of the content creator */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the content creator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_creator_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership metric entry */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "viewers_month" INTEGER /* Total number of viewers in the month */,
  "viewers_average" REAL /* Average number of viewers per stream */,
  "viewers_gain" INTEGER /* Gain in viewers compared to the previous month */,
  "viewers_percentage_gain" REAL /* Percentage gain in viewers compared to the previous month */,
  "viewers_peak" INTEGER /* Peak number of viewers during the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_metrics_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming metric entry */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "streams_month" INTEGER /* Total number of streams in the month */,
  "streams_average" REAL /* Average number of streams per day */,
  "streams_gain" INTEGER /* Gain in streams compared to the previous month */,
  "streams_percentage_gain" REAL /* Percentage gain in streams compared to the previous month */,
  "streams_peak" INTEGER /* Peak number of streams during the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_metrics_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watched_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watched metric entry */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "watched_month" INTEGER /* Total number of watched minutes in the month */,
  "watched_value" REAL /* Value of watched minutes */,
  "watched_gain" INTEGER /* Gain in watched minutes compared to the previous month */,
  "watched_percentage_gain" REAL /* Percentage gain in watched minutes compared to the previous month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watched_metrics_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the content */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail image of the content */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the content in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tags FOREIGN KEY ("tags") REFERENCES content_tags ("tag_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the content */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the content was viewed */,
  "view_duration" REAL /* Duration of the view in minutes */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to view the content */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used to view the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the content */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_text" TEXT /* Text associated with the interaction (e.g., comment text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_interactions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user's account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "category" TEXT /* Favorite category of the user */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Favorite content type of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., view, like, comment, share) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tag_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag association */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tag_associations_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES content_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_tag_associations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creator_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "subscriber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscriber */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creator_subscriptions_subscriber_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscriber_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creator_subscriptions_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creator_earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning entry */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content creator */,
  "earning_type" TEXT /* Type of earning (e.g., subscription, ad) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount earned */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the earning was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_creator_earnings_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES content_creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_recommendations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
